discriminating_evidence.AC-SEND-1_before: pre-story: leaveGroup sends kind-13 and kind-9 for EVERY leave, solo or not — a solo-group leave produces a redundant send with no recipient. This is the bug the story fixes, not a hypothetical.
discriminating_evidence.AC-SEND-1_after: post-story: solo group (members length 1, self) -> lastMember true -> neither send fires (leaveGroupImpl.test.ts 'AC-SEND-1' case)
discriminating_evidence.AC-PURGE-1_before: pre-story: clearPendingJoinRequestsForGroup has zero call sites in the codebase; no invite-link clear of any kind exists.
discriminating_evidence.AC-PURGE-1_after: post-story: both clears run unconditionally at the end of leaveGroupImpl's purge sequence, on both the solo and multi-member fixtures (leaveGroupImpl.test.ts 'AC-PURGE-1' cases x2).
